headline: MSCI Expands Multi-Asset and Alternative Index Capabilities With Acquisition of Compass Financial Technologies
summary: NEW YORK, March 03, 2026--MSCI Inc. (NYSE: MSCI) is enhancing its index calculation capabilities in alternative and multi-asset classes, including commodities and cryptocurrencies, through the acquisition of index services provider, Compass Financial Technologies.

headline: MSCI’s Vantager Deal Puts Data Growth Against Recent Share Weakness
summary: MSCI (NYSE:MSCI) has acquired Vantager to expand its data and analytics capabilities. The deal is aimed at strengthening MSCI's technology toolkit for financial institutions and other clients. The acquisition aligns with MSCI's long term focus on growing its core financial data and analytics offerings. MSCI, which last closed at $573.88, is a major player in indexes, portfolio analytics, and related data for global investors. The stock is up 6.6% over the past week and has returned 50.4%...
